measure_once.eyebrow: Appliance fit, with practical clearance built in
measure_once.title: Measure once. Find the appliances that actually fit.
measure_once.sub: Enter your cavity dimensions and narrow the list with practical airflow buffers, door-swing and access checks.

clearance_first.eyebrow: Real clearance data for Australian homes
clearance_first.title: Cavity dimensions in, fitting models out.
clearance_first.sub: Start with your opening size, then compare the models that make sense once clearance and access are checked.

australian_sizes.eyebrow: Australian appliances, checked against your space
australian_sizes.title: Australian appliances, sized to your cavity.
australian_sizes.sub: Use one set of measurements to sort fridges, washers, dishwashers and dryers before you shop in earnest.
